news.headline: ReNew’s FY 2026 Net Profit Doubles as Capacity Additions Sustain Momentum
news.summary: Decarbonization solutions company ReNew’s revenue for the fourth quarter (Q4) of financial year (FY) 2025-26 rose 9.5% to ₹31.79 billion (~$330.44 million) from ₹29.05 billion (~$301.89 million).

news.headline: Bondada Engineering Secures BoS Orders for Adani’s 250 MW Solar Project
news.summary: Engineering, procurement, and construction company, Bondada Engineering has received multiple orders from Adani Green Energy (AGEL) and Adani Green Energy Six totaling ₹4.7 billion (~$48.9 million) for the balance-of-system (BoS) package of a 250 MW solar power project in Khavda, Kutch, Gujarat.

news.headline: India’s Policies Shift Focus to Storage, Grid Reliability, and Compliance in Q1 2026
news.summary: India’s renewable energy sector is entering a phase of stricter regulatory compliance, growing storage integration, and evolving market structures, according to Mercom India’s newly released Q1 2026 Renewable Energy Policy Impact Report. The one-of-a-kind report analyzed key renewable energy poli

news.headline: Canadian Solar Expands Battery Storage and US Manufacturing Despite Weak Module Sales

news.headline: Sunstream Secures ₹7 Billion Refinancing for 250 MW Solar Portfolio from SBI

news.headline: India Restricts Silver Bar Imports, Solar Manufacturers May Face Cost Pressure
news.summary: The Directorate General of Foreign Trade has amended the import policy for certain silver bars, moving them from the Free category to Restricted with immediate effect.

news.headline: MENA Weekly Round-Up: Abu Dhabi to Top Solar Capacity Additions by 2035
news.summary: According to the Emirates Water and Electricity Company, Abu Dhabi will lead solar capacity additions in the United Arab Emirates (UAE) in 2035. Abu Dhabi’s solar capacity additions are expected to increase by almost 2,000% between 2020 and 2030, with 17.5 GW of installed capacity forecasted. By

news.headline: SLR Solar inaugurates 800 MW solar PV module manufacturing facility in Rajasthan
news.summary: SLR Solar Private Limited has inaugurated an 800 MW TOPCon solar module manufacturing facility in Kishangarh, Rajasthan. The fully automated and artificial intelligence-enabled plant will manufacture high efficiency TOPCon glass-to-glass solar photovoltaic (PV) modules. The

news.headline: Bondada Engineering bags Rs 4.69 billion solar BoS orders from Adani
news.summary: Bondada Engineering Limited has secured multiple orders worth Rs 4.69 billion from Adani Group. The orders have been awarded by Adani Green Energy Limited and Adani Green Energy Six Limited for the execution of the

news.headline: MNRE issues operational guidelines for small hydro power scheme

news.headline: India and Netherlands ink agreements for cooperation on energy transition
news.summary: India and the Netherlands have inked key agreements to strengthen bilateral cooperation in the areas of energy transition, sustainable development and maritime development. During their meeting in The Hague on 16 May 2026, Prime Minister

news.headline: EVREC files EIS for green hydrogen and ammonia project in Canada
news.summary: Exploits Valley Renewable Energy Corporation (EVREC) has filed the environmental impact statement (EIS) for its wind-to-green hydrogen and ammonia project in Central Newfoundland, Canada. EVREC is a joint venture between Abraxas Power and EDF power

news.headline: OX2 begins construction of 135 MWac solar farm and 100 MW BESS in Australia
news.summary: OX2 has commenced construction of the Muswellbrook solar farm and battery project in New South Wales, Australia. The project features 135 MWac of solar capacity and 100 MW of battery energy storage system (BESS). The

news.headline: European Energy begins construction on 225.5 MW AgriPV project in Sicily
news.summary: European Energy has commenced construction of a 225.5 MW agrivoltaic project in Sicily, Italy, following a final investment decision of more than €200 million. The project is expected to generate around 405 GWh of electricity

news.headline: Inox Clean Energy powers into top three with ₹25k crore buys, says company official
news.summary: This strategic move positions the company among the top three renewable energy players in India, with a global footprint across three continents.

news.headline: NTPC adds 5,488 MW renewable energy capacity in FY26
news.summary: NTPC Group has added 5,488 MW of renewable energy capacity during FY26 across solar, wind and pumped storage projects, strengthening its clean energy portfolio.

news.headline: Pace Digitek secures contract for 250 MW/500 MWh BESS in Tamil Nadu
news.summary: Pace Digitek Limited has secured a contract worth Rs 7,099.19 million from NLC India Renewables Limited for a 250 MW/500 MWh battery energy storage system (BESS) in Tamil Nadu. The project will be developed across

news.headline: SECI announces results of 10 MW solar plus storage auction
news.summary: The Solar Energy Corporation of India (SECI) has announced BNC Power Projects as the winner of its auction to develop a 10 MW grid-connected solar project along with a 10 MW/20 MWh battery energy storage

news.headline: PSPCL announces results of 1 GWh BESS auction
news.summary: Punjab State Power Corporation Limited (PSPCL) has announced the results of its auction to set up 500 MW/1,000 MWh standalone battery energy storage system (BESS) projects in Punjab. Stockwell Solar won 150 MW/300 MWh capacity

news.headline: JSW Energy commissions 250 MW of renewable energy capacity, including hydro, since April 2026
news.summary: JSW Energy has commissioned 250 MW of renewable energy capacity since April 2026, comprising 130 MW of wind, 69.4 MW of solar, and the 50 MW Tidong Hydro Plant. With this addition, its total installed power generation capacity has reached 13.7 GW.

news.headline: Inox Clean buys US assets of Boviet Solar
news.summary: Through this asset purchase, Inox Clean gains an operational capacity of 3 GW of TOPCon solar module manufacturing in the United States, positioning it in line with the “Make in America, For America” initiative.
